##NAMES=Laihunite
##RRUFFID=R110051
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=(Fe^3+^,Fe^2+^,[box])_2_(SiO_4_)
##LOCALITY=Laihe Fe deposit, Qianshan District, Anshan Prefecture, Liaoning Province, China
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Pingqu Fu
##DESCRIPTION=Unconsolidated black subhedral grains. Type sample
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R110051
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 4.811 b: 10.242 c: 17.522 alpha: 90 beta: 90.01 gamma: 90 volume: 863.4 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
